TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Dadowacen, title = Dadowacen, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dadowacen} }

S.FORM: alang Dadowacen ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Cinkong Song, kwara sali buwan nya ga 122 buwan, 276 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 70% kyan ku 194 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 30% kyan ku 82 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 66%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Dadowacen hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Dadowacen hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Dadowacen hya' ga Hikasiki go. tay mkraya' na Dadowacen hya' ga Nakahama go. tay mkraya' na Dadowacen hya' ga Tomiyac. tay mkyahu' na Dadowacen hya' ga Folalacay. rekisi kayal kyokay alang Dadowacen ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan alang Dadowacen ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Dadowacen ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Cinkong Song, kwara sali buwan nya ga 122 buwan, 276 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 70% kyan ku 194 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 30% kyan ku 82 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 66%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Dadowacen hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Dadowacen hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Dadowacen hya' ga Hikasiki go. tay mkraya' na Dadowacen hya' ga Nakahama go. tay mkraya' na Dadowacen hya' ga Tomiyac. tay mkyahu' na Dadowacen hya' ga Folalacay. rekisi kayal kyokay alang Dadowacen ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan alang Dadowacen ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ *a*owaʦ~ʨen ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ʦ~ʨinkoŋ s~ɕoŋ, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na *a*owaʦ~ʨen ħjaʔ ɣa ws~ɕiluŋ kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na *a*owaʦ~ʨen ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na *a*owaʦ~ʨen ħjaʔ ɣa ħikas~ɕiki ɣo. taj mkrajaʔ na *a*owaʦ~ʨen ħjaʔ ɣa nakaħama ɣo. taj mkrajaʔ na *a*owaʦ~ʨen ħjaʔ ɣa tomijaʦ~ʨ. taj mkjaħuʔ na *a*owaʦ~ʨen ħjaʔ ɣa *olalaʦ~ʨaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj alaŋ *a*owaʦ~ʨen ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan alaŋ *a*owaʦ~ʨen ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
